sn2.7:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, the young deva Pañcalacaṇḍa recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn2.7:1.2:
2
"The one of broad wisdom has indeed found
The opening in the midst of confinement,
The Buddha who discovered jhāna,
The withdrawn chief bull, the sage."
3
"Even in the midst of confinement they find it,
"The Dhamma for the attainment of Nibbāna—
Those who have acquired mindfulness,
Those perfectly well concentrated."
